# Vet & Pet - Κτηνιατρείο & Pet Shop, Πρέβεζα

> Veterinary clinic and pet shop in Preveza, Greece, run by veterinarian Katerina Giaprou (Κατερίνα Γιαπρού). Caring, modern small-animal care for dogs and cats, plus a pet shop. Bilingual site (Greek default, English under /en/).

## Key facts
- Business: Vet & Pet (Κτηνιατρείο & Pet Shop)
- Veterinarian: Katerina Giaprou (Κατερίνα Γιαπρού)
- Address: Ιωαννίνων 34B, Πρέβεζα 48100, Greece (Ioanninon 34B, Preveza)
- Phone: 26820 89457. Mobile/emergencies: 694 865 9158
- Email: vetandpetpreveza@gmail.com
- Hours: Mon–Fri 09:00–20:00, Sat 09:00–15:00, Sun closed
- Languages: Greek (el), English (en)

## Services
- Clinical examination / wellness check
- Vaccinations
- Microchip and pet passports
- Diagnostic ultrasound
- Surgery
- Dental care
- Antiparasitic treatment
- Nutrition advice
- Pet shop: food, toys, accessories, health products

## Pages
- [Home (EL)](https://www.vetandpet.gr/): overview of the clinic and pet shop
- [Services (EL)](https://www.vetandpet.gr/services/): full list of veterinary services
- [Shop (EL)](https://www.vetandpet.gr/shop/): pet shop products
- [Gallery (EL)](https://www.vetandpet.gr/gallery/): photos of the clinic
- [About (EL)](https://www.vetandpet.gr/about/): Katerina's story and values
- [FAQ (EL)](https://www.vetandpet.gr/faq/): common questions (hours, emergencies, microchip)
- [Contact (EL)](https://www.vetandpet.gr/contact/): address, phone, map, hours
- [Privacy & Cookies (EL)](https://www.vetandpet.gr/privacy/)
